name: Smoked Chicken Louisianne
recipeInstructions:
1. FOR MARINADE: Combine all marinade ingredients and stir with a wire whisk until well blended.
2. Add chicken breasts to the marinade and cover. Let sit at room temperature for 30 minutes.
3. FOR SMOKING: Prepare your smoker according to the manufacturer's instructions. Have pecan wood chips and sugar cane ready if possible.
4. Place one quart of water in the water pan along with two cans of Barq's root beer. The root beer will give the chicken a unique flavor.
5. Once the smoker is preheated, place the water pan in position and add small amounts of pecan wood chips and sugar cane to the hot coals.
6. Place chicken breasts on the middle smoker rack and cook according to desired temperature.
7. Check for doneness at one hour. Chicken breasts can be served warm over lettuce as an entree or sliced cold with sweet mustard as an appetizer.
Recipe source: Gail Shipp, 21 Aug 96
